page_metadata.biotools__summary: Computer program used for automated construction of genetic maps. It has been developed primarily for large-scale linkage mapping of markers genotyped in the CEPH reference pedigrees. It has been adapted for automated construction of radiation hybrid maps.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Computer program used for automated construction of genetic maps. It has been developed primarily for large-scale linkage mapping of markers genotyped in the CEPH reference pedigrees. It has been adapted for automated construction of radiation hybrid maps.
